title: ionoxalis tetraphylla
intro: Ionoxalis tetraphylla, also known as the four-leafed ionoxalis or ionoxalis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of ionoxalis tetraphylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of ionoxalis tetraphylla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, or by using a combination of the plant's roots and leaves.
